Item 1. Business

The Company designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories.

The Company's products include iPhone, Mac, iPad, and wearables.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

The Company faces substantial competition in all areas.

Global markets are highly competitive and subject to rapid change.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Total net revenue was $394.3 billion for fiscal 2024.

The Company expects continued investment in research and development.
